notes: THE TOWER visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Other Engineer
visitors.lore_text: You see The Other Engineer. (THE TOWER beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the other engineer is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Other Engineer. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Other Engineer tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Other Engineer what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Other Engineer stays for a beat. You stay back.
